zh.Sissinghurst, Kent, England: 英國肯特米爾胡斯 史崔特
zh.Milkhouse Street, Kent, England: 英國肯特米爾胡斯 史崔特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Benet Middlelton於1430年出生在英國時，她的父親John Middleton21歲，母親Margaret Bromley20歲。她於大約1454年與Thomas Baker在英國肯特可藍別盧可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年在英國肯特米爾胡斯 史崔特享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benet Middlelton于1430年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Middleton21岁，母亲Margaret Bromley20岁。她于大约1454年与Thomas Baker在英国肯特可藍別盧可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1509年在英国肯特米爾胡斯 史崔特享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Middlelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

variants.name: Midthun
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of about ten farmsteads in western Norway named Midtun, from Old Norse mith ‘middle’ + tún ‘enclosure, farmstead’. Compare Middleton .

variants.name: Melton
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middlebrook
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost Micklebrook in Blackburn (Lancashire), recorded as Mikelbroc in the 13th century. The placename appears to derive from Old English micel ‘big’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’. The surname has undergone a dissimilatory or folk-etymological change from Mickle- to Middle-.

variants.name: Milton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the many places called Milton, or sometimes Middleton (see Middleton ) and occasionally Melton (see Melton ), most of which derive from Old English middel ‘middle’ or myln ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Benet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Church Latin benedictus ‘blessed’. This was the name of the saint ( c.480– c.550 ) who composed the Benedictine rule of Christian monastic life that is still followed in essence by all Western orders. He was born near Spoleto in Umbria, central Italy. After studying in Rome, he went to live as a hermit at Subiaco, and later organized groups of followers and imitators into monastic cells. In c.529 he moved to Monte Cassino, where he founded the great monastery that is still the centre of the Benedictine order. His rule is simple, restrained, and practical. See also Bennett .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Benet Middlelton was born in 1430, in England, her father, John Middleton, was 21 and her mother, Margaret Bromley, was 20. She married Thomas Baker about 1454, in Cranbrook, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1509, in Milkhouse Street, Kent, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benet Middlelton est née en 1430, à Angleterre, son père, John Middleton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bromley, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Baker environ 1454, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1509, à Milkhouse Street, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benet Middlelton 1430 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Middleton 21 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bromley 20. Sie hat um 1454 in Cranbrook, Kent, England Thomas Baker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1509 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Milkhouse Street, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benet Middlelton è nata il nel 1430 nel England, sua padre, John Middleton, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Margaret Bromley, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Baker circa 1454, nel Cranbrook, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1509, nel Milkhouse Street, Kent, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Benet Middleltonが1430年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Middletonは21歳，母Margaret Bromleyは20歳であった。約1454年にイギリスケントクランブルークでThomas Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1509年にイギリスケントミルクハウゼ ストレエトで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Benet Middlelton(이)가 1430년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Middleton(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bromley(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1454년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 Thomas Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 영국 켄트 미k하스 스트릿에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benet Middlelton nasceu em 1430, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Middleton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bromley, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Baker aproximadamente 1454, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1509, em Milkhouse Street, Kent, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benet Middlelton родилась в 1430 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Middleton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bromley, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Baker около 1454 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1509 г. в местности милхоус стрит, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benet Middlelton nació en 1430, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Middleton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Bromley, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Thomas Baker aproximadamente 1454, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1509, en Milkhouse Street, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
